CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that respiratory therapy was administered for at least 15 minutes in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
 ^=Blank (skip pattern)
532 O0400E1_PSYCH_THRPY_MIN_NUM O0400E1_PSYCH_THRPY_MIN_NUM O0400E1 Psychological Therapy Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that psychological therapy was administered to the resident in the last seven days. discontinued
